title: 3 Weird Facts About Trees

segments.text: Some trees can communicate through their roots!
But that’s just the start of it.
Trees can send distress signals to warn each other.
And they can live for thousands of years!
What else are trees hiding from us?
Follow for more facts that sound fake but are real.

description: These tree facts may change how you see them! Follow for daily facts! 🌳
